LanguageData.Bullet_PsyCast_SMG.label: PsyCast SMG Bullet
LanguageData.TW_PsyCast_SMG.label: PsyCast SMG
LanguageData.TW_PsyCast_SMG.description: This custom psy-submachine gun was engineered exclusively for Minitor. Chronic 996 work regimes gave this mechanoid severe scapulohumeral periarthritis decades ahead of schedule, permanently disabling its ability to handle conventional firearms like its counterparts. Despite its submachine gun designation, it functions more like a high-tech bubble blaster - firing psy-bullets that travel at speeds resembling drifting soap bubbles, slow enough for leisurely strolling elders to evade effortlessly. Yet even its negligible recoil presents formidable challenges for the unit's tremor-plagued manipulator arms.
LanguageData.TW_PsyCast_SMG.tools.grip.label: grip
LanguageData.TW_PsyCast_SMG.tools.barrel.label: barrel
LanguageData.TW_PsyCast_SMG.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: PsyCast SMG
